hero.subtext: Our unique model lets your facility retain 100% of therapy revenue while Evolve drives clinical outcomes, compliance, and operational excellence.

clinicalExcellence.description: Our vision is to provide the most creative therapy consulting model through compassionate leadership, clinical passion, and evidence-based experience.

stats.label: Revenue Retained
stats.desc: Your facility keeps every dollar of therapy revenue - zero shared with us.

stats.label: Years Experience
stats.desc: Two decades of LTC clinical and operational leadership expertise.

stats.label: Clinical Support
stats.desc: Round-the-clock access to your dedicated regional director.

stats.label: States Served
stats.desc: Active management across major U.S. markets and growing.

services.title: Evidence-Based Practice
services.desc: Real-time PDPM case mix analysis, MDS accuracy reviews, and data-driven business intelligence customized to your specific market.

services.title: Holistic Patient Outcomes
services.desc: Patient-centric, outcome-based programming that drives five-star ratings and measurable improvements in functional independence.

services.title: Compliance Management
services.desc: Full denial management, regulatory audit support, and proactive SNF compliance oversight - so you focus on care, not paperwork.

services.title: Medicaid Case Mix
services.desc: Detailed quality measure analysis, case mix efficiency reviews, and Medicaid reimbursement optimization for your payer mix.

services.title: In-House Transition
services.desc: Seamless migration from contract therapy to an in-house model with staff retention, culture building, and zero disruption to care.

services.title: Operational Growth
services.desc: Tiered pricing reductions as your business scales, grooming internal staff for regional leadership roles within your own organization.

process.title: The Evolve
process.description: Our systematic approach ensures a seamless transition and sustained operational excellence for your therapy department.

steps.title: Clinical Audit
steps.desc: We perform a deep-dive analysis of your current clinical metrics and PDPM case mix efficiency.

steps.title: Strategic Roadmap
steps.desc: Our directors develop a customized transition plan tailored to your facility's specific goals.

steps.title: Active Management
steps.desc: Daily oversight and mentorship to ensure peak clinical and financial performance.

steps.title: Ongoing Growth
steps.desc: Ongoing audits, education, and operational refinement keep you ahead of regulatory changes.

ourServices.title: Clinical Program Excellence
ourServices.description: At Evolve, we provide all the services you require to provide your patients with the highest possible level of care while you truly EVOLVE to the next level.

featuredCard.title: Clinical Cost &
featuredCard.description: Receive a comprehensive, data-driven overview of your facility's current therapy health. Strategic insights with no legacy strings attached.

items.question: How do we retain 100% of revenue?
items.answer: Our management model empowers you to keep all therapy billing while we provide the oversight and staff for a fixed management fee.

items.question: Can we transition from contract therapy?
items.answer: Yes, we specialize in seamless transitions from third-party contracts to efficient in-house models.

partner.title: Join The Clinical Evolution
partner.desc: Ready to take control of your facility's therapy future? Let's discuss a customized roadmap.
